examples: Your paling small does not serve the world.
He has just put up a paling around the house.
A new paling had been erected around the yard.
There are the rockets fired off in distress, which one passenger recalled as paling against the dazzling starlight.
Federer faced 10 break points against the third seed as his serve let him down badly, his 55 per cent of first serves paling in comparison to Davydenko's 79 per cent.
